svg.aria-label: Vectorized pixel-art quadcopter drone, white background, OVI sci-fi style
svg.title: OVI Sci-Fi Pixel-Art Drone — Vector Trace
svg.desc: Layered SVG vectorization of the generated drone pixel-art reference. Built for Claude/Claude Code to render or convert into HTML/CSS/SVG components. White background retained; drone geometry is grouped by quantized fill colors with crisp pixel-art edges.
svg.metadata: {"source": "a_clean_white_background_with_a_detailed_pixel_art.png", "width": 1398, "height": 1125, "palette_size": 30, "notes": "Posterized vector trace: edit groups by fill color; shape-rendering crispEdges; preserve white background and pixel-art aesthetics."}
